working: shellEscape() added to momentum-watcher.cjs — wraps all file path args in single quotes with embedded-quote escaping
23 exec/execSync call sites updated: analyze_audio.py, analyze_vocal_eq.py, ffmpeg, ffprobe, demucs
Filenames with backticks, apostrophes, single quotes, spaces now safe in all shell commands
next: Test ANALYZER: verify tonal balance + stereo width panels appear after Essentia analysis on a WAV. Monitor Spotify queue.
notes: shellEscape uses POSIX single-quote wrapping: "'" + str.replace(/'/g, "'\\''" ) + "'". This is safe for all shells (/bin/sh, bash, zsh). Script paths (ANALYZE_SCRIPT, etc.) remain double-quoted since they are constant and do not contain user-provided content.
